known_gaps: Design-level multi-block PCB output carries pad/copper net code evidence, and local LED block routes now bind to physical same-net pad anchors.
Full inter-block connector-to-LED routing is intentionally skipped until this fixture can be promoted to a routed KiCad-backed pass candidate.
notes: Tracks connector-to-LED composition readiness for optional KiCad-backed design examples after local route endpoint binding.
